name: Total Immersion Remote
description:
You ordered a new remote control for your TV, but the one you got delivered looks a little strange. It has a button labeled "Total Immersion". What does it do? There's only one way to find out...

For best results, please specify what exactly you're seeing on screen and which character you are pointing the remote at.

Based on Magical Remote by @Folium_leaf.
creator: each-of-the-two
